hypotheses:
scottApp1 : forall _ : prod (sig (fun f : forall _ : D, D' => isContinuous f)) D,
D'

scottApp1 : forall _ : prod (sig (fun f : forall _ : D, D' => isContinuous f)) D,
D'
goals.goal:
forall x2 : D,
isMonotonic1
  (fun x1 : sig (fun f : forall _ : D, D' => isContinuous f) =>
   scottApp1 (pair x1 x2))

hypotheses:
scottApp1 : forall _ : prod (sig (fun f : forall _ : D, D' => isContinuous f)) D,
D'
goals.goal:
forall x1 : sig (fun f : forall _ : D, D' => isContinuous f),
isMonotonic1 (fun x2 : D => scottApp1 (pair x1 x2))

proofs: unfold isMonotonic1. intros [[f hf] x] [[g hg] y] Hle. simpl. destruct Hle as [Hf Hx]. transitivity (g x).

hypotheses:
Hx : leProp
  (snd
     (pair (exist (fun f : forall _ : D, D' => isContinuous f) f hf) x))
  (snd
     (pair (exist (fun f : forall _ : D, D' => isContinuous f) g hg) y))

Hf : leProp
  (fst
     (pair (exist (fun f : forall _ : D, D' => isContinuous f) f hf) x))
  (fst
     (pair (exist (fun f : forall _ : D, D' => isContinuous f) g hg) y))

scottApp1 : forall _ : prod (sig (fun f : forall _ : D, D' => isContinuous f)) D,
D'

Hx : leProp
  (snd
     (pair (exist (fun f : forall _ : D, D' => isContinuous f) f hf) x))
  (snd
     (pair (exist (fun f : forall _ : D, D' => isContinuous f) g hg) y))

Hf : leProp
  (fst
     (pair (exist (fun f : forall _ : D, D' => isContinuous f) f hf) x))
  (fst
     (pair (exist (fun f : forall _ : D, D' => isContinuous f) g hg) y))

scottApp1 : forall _ : prod (sig (fun f : forall _ : D, D' => isContinuous f)) D,
D'

attempts:
intros [[f1 c1] a1] [[f2 c2] a2] Hle. destruct Hle as [Hle_f Hle_x]. destruct Hle_f as [Hle_f']. simpl. transitivity (proj1_sig f1 a2).
- apply (ScottContinuousMap_isMonotonic f1 c1 a1 a2 Hle_x).
- apply (Hle_f' a2).

apply (proj1 (seperately_monotonic_iff_monotonic scottApp1)). split.
- intro x2. unfold isMonotonic1. intros [f Hf] [g Hg] Hle. simpl in Hle. apply (Hle x2).
- intro f. destruct f as [f Hcont]. apply ScottContinuousMap_isMonotonic with (CONTINUIOUS := Hcont).

unfold isMonotonic1. intros [[f hf] x] [[g hg] y] Hle. simpl. destruct Hle as [Hf Hx]. transitivity (g x).
- apply (Hf x).
- apply (continuous_isMonotonic hg x y Hx).
unfold isMonotonic1; intros [[f Hf] x] [[g Hg] y] [Hfg Hx]; simpl in Hfg; simpl; etransitivity; [apply Hfg | apply (isContinuous_monotonic g Hg x y Hx)].
failed_attempts:
intros [[f1 c1] a1] [[f2 c2] a2] Hle. destruct Hle as [Hle_f Hle_x]. destruct Hle_f as [Hle_f']. simpl. transitivity (proj1_sig f1 a2).
- apply (ScottContinuousMap_isMonotonic f1 c1 a1 a2 Hle_x).
- apply (Hle_f' a2).
unfold isMonotonic1; intros [[f Hf] x] [[g Hg] y] [Hfg Hx]; simpl in Hfg; simpl; etransitivity; [apply Hfg | apply (isContinuous_monotonic g Hg x y Hx)].
